U

unflagCharacter(int) - Method in class com.gcu.business.CharacterDatabaseService
Unflags a character by its ID, removing the flagged status.
unflagCharacter(int, HttpSession) - Method in class com.gcu.controllers.CharactersController
Handles POST requests to "/characters/unflag/{id}" endpoint, allowing admin users to unflag a character by its ID.
updateCharacter(CharacterEntity) - Method in class com.gcu.business.CharacterDatabaseService
Updates an existing character in the database, allowing changes to all fields including visibility and flagging status.
updateCharacter(CharacterEntity, HttpSession) - Method in class com.gcu.controllers.CharactersController
Handles POST requests to "/characters/edit" endpoint, allowing users to submit the form for editing an existing character.
UserController - Class in com.gcu.controllers
UserController is responsible for handling user authentication and registration processes in the application.
UserController(UserDatabaseService) - Constructor for class com.gcu.controllers.UserController
Constructor for UserController that initializes the UserDatabaseService dependency.
UserDatabaseService - Class in com.gcu.business
Service class for handling user-related database operations.
UserDatabaseService(UserRepository) - Constructor for class com.gcu.business.UserDatabaseService
Constructor for UserDatabaseService.
UserEntity - Class in com.gcu.models
UserEntity represents a user of the application.
UserEntity() - Constructor for class com.gcu.models.UserEntity
Default constructor for UserEntity.
usernameExists(String) - Method in class com.gcu.business.UserDatabaseService
Checks if a username already exists in the database.
UserRepository - Interface in com.gcu.data
UserRepository is an interface that extends JpaRepository to provide CRUD operations for UserEntity objects.
